adapterMapping.search: Not enabled; use the register search/browse surface only after a machine-readable contract is verified.
adapterMapping.retrieval: Future adapter may retrieve authorised PDF; HTML/Word must be labelled by authority and format.
adapterMapping.versioning: Use effective date, republication number, and law-history cues; do not infer versions from filenames alone.
adapterMapping.export: Remain unsupported until a source-backed parser and provenance-preserving export exists.
adapterMapping.provenance: Emit sourceAuthority, jurisdiction, source URL, format, authority status, and retrieval timestamp.
adapterMapping.unsupported: Return structured unsupported_provider_capability for runtime operations until tests and fixtures prove the adapter.

edgeCases: pre-12 September 2001 coverage is not complete
Word files are not authorised versions
HTML search output may contain hit highlighting rather than canonical text
current, repealed, notified, and point-in-time materials are distinct classes
no public machine-readable API or feed was verified in this discovery pass
fixturePolicy: metadata-only source-shape fixture; no legal text or fabricated records
